stemHtml:
An aircraft is descending at a constant Mach number. Given the following true airspeed (TAS) and calibrated airspeed (CAS) values:

At FL 350: TAS = 350 knots, CAS = 250 knots
At FL 150: TAS = 450 knots, CAS = 300 knots

What happens to TAS and CAS when descending at a constant Mach Number?
